M
MegaTrend Intelligence
Research dashboard — v0.2
localStorage
Storage: localStorage (build phase). Supabase wiring deferred — see supabase-ddl.sql.
Trend registry
Your curated megatrend list.
Import trends JSON
Paste the output of the trends.md Claude Project prompt. Re-imports upsert by id.
Dashboard validates against schemas/trends.schema.json.
News
Classified news by trend. Export today's set as a linked PDF.
Import news JSON
Paste the output of the news.md prompt. Dedupes by hash.
Validates against schemas/news.schema.json. Auto-prunes items older than 30 days.
Movers
Top US gainers and losers with catalysts. Cached per day.
Force refresh
Finnhub API key (optional)
Stored locally; only used for the catalyst waterfall. Free tier is 60 req/min.
Working...
Macro
FRED + Treasuries (live) · FOMC + calendar (pasted).
Treasury yields
Import macro JSON (FOMC + calendar)
Output of macro.md. FRED values + yields are fetched live — not part of this payload.
Validates against schemas/macro.schema.json.
FOMC probabilities
Event calendar
MegaTrend Dashboard · localStorage backend · prune old data · storage counts
v0.2 · Build phase · No auth (deferred to parent platform)
